description: Guidance and steps for handling EMERGENCY scenario.
escalationGuidance: Escalate to officer review if applicant is unsatisfied.
eligibility: All citizens residing in Uttar Pradesh.
risks: Potential delays if documentation is incomplete.
escalationRules: Escalate immediately to emergency response unit.
officerGuidance: Verify the applicant credentials and assign to the target station.
citizenGuidance: Ensure all details provided are complete and true.
references: Uttar Pradesh Police Citizen Services Manual
